questions.q: On April 30, 2026, U.S. senators agreed to ban themselves from trading on which type of platforms, such as Kalshi and Polymarket?
In a major repatriation announced on April 30, 2026, officials from which U.S. state returned more than 650 looted antiquities valued at $14 million to India?
U.S. President Donald Trump signed an executive order on April 30, 2026, authorizing which cross-border crude pipeline segment from Canada into Wyoming?
A paper highlighted on May 1, 2026, details how Northwestern University researchers successfully used plasma to convert methane into what important industrial chemical?
In a massive 24-hour global logistics operation reported in early May 2026, the United States shipped how many tons of munitions and equipment to Israel?
Which New Orleans sheriff was indicted by a grand jury on 30 felony charges in late April 2026 regarding the previous escape of 10 inmates?
As reported on May 1, 2026, researchers at the University of Queensland developed a new scalable vapour-based manufacturing process for perovskite solar cells that eliminates what toxic material?
U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer told Canadians at a Washington roundtable that what phrase is considered strict administration policy, not just a slogan?
In the 2026 World Press Freedom Index released by Reporters Without Borders, Ukraine overtook which country that fell to 64th place?
Following a Ukrainian drone strike on a local refinery, residents of which Russian Black Sea town feared an environmental disaster after reporting that 'oil is literally falling from the sky'?
